title: Beef Tacos
description: Seasoned ground beef in warm tortillas with fresh toppings and zesty lime.
steps: Brown the ground beef in a large pan over high heat, breaking it up as it cooks.
Drain excess fat. Add chili powder, cumin, paprika, garlic powder, and a splash of water. Cook for 3 minutes.
Warm tortillas in a dry pan or microwave.
Dice tomato and avocado. Chop cilantro. Cut lime into wedges.
Assemble tacos: spoon beef into tortillas, top with tomato, avocado, cilantro, a squeeze of lime, and sour cream.
